description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a rectangular frame constructed from light-colored wood. The structure features four evenly spaced horizontal shelves, each appearing to be made from a gray, textured material, possibly metal or composite. The open design allows visibility and access from both the front and sides, with no doors or enclosed compartments. The legs are long and straight, elevating the shelves well above the ground, giving the unit a modern, minimalist appearance. The overall build suggests it is intended for use as a display or storage shelf in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public spaces. The absence of handles, doors, or glass panels emphasizes its open, accessible nature.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with four gray shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is freestanding and accessible from all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full height of the unit, with all four gray shelves visible within the wooden frame.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the narrow profile of the unit, highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open sides.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same arrangement of shelves and wooden frame.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the slim profile and open construction, similar to view 1.
